claim: Domain-specific models like MedGemma (medical-focused) provide better performance on specialized tasks than general-purpose models
actionable: For regulated or specialized domains (medical, legal, finance), evaluate domain-trained models alongside general ones for accuracy and compliance

claim: Open-source medical models enable deployment in regulated environments where proprietary model terms are prohibited
actionable: For medical/healthcare products, prioritize open-source models with explicit licensing for healthcare use

claim: Fine-tuning on specialized datasets is more effective than prompt engineering for domain-specific accuracy
actionable: For mission-critical domains, collect domain examples and fine-tune a base model rather than relying on in-context prompting
